bull.b: F1Q26 gross profit margin was 23.7%, up from 15.7% in the prior year period and 12.1% in the prior quarter.
NEOV reported record quarterly revenue surpassing $6.5M due to expansion into more U.S. states and higher shipment volumes under recently added distribution partners.
NEOV completed the acquisition of substantially all assets of private energy storage company Neubau Energy, which could enhance future growth opportunities.

bear.b: F1Q26 cash burn of $2.5M was above the forecast, indicating higher than expected cash outflow.
NEOV's gross profit margin below forecast in the fourth quarter and a decline in inventory indicate margin challenges in growing ESS sales without meaningful cost increases and investment.
Overhead costs of $2.4M, up 130% y/y, exceeded the $1.6M forecast, indicating rising expenses impacting profitability.
